name: Western Union
description_short: The Western Union at 7555 SW Barbur Blvd in Portland, OR offers check cashing and money transfers daily.
description_long:
Western Union's check-cashing branch at 7555 SW Barbur Blvd operates in southwest Portland as a standalone location. This Portland storefront maintains consistent seven-day-a-week hours from 7 AM to 11 PM, making it accessible for early morning and late-evening transactions. The location on SW Barbur Blvd serves the Multnomah Village and surrounding Portland neighborhoods with reliable access to money transfers and check-cashing services.

At this Portland, OR location, you can cash checks, send domestic and international wire transfers, and access bill payment services. Call 503-452-3000 to confirm specific services or ask about fees. The staff can assist with agent-assisted money transfers and process check deposits during business hours.

Residents of Portland often use this Western Union branch for quick money transfers and check cashing—bring a valid ID and the check or transfer details you need. Given the 7 AM opening, this location works well for early-morning travelers or shift workers. The SW Barbur Blvd branch offers extended hours and convenient standalone access that Portland residents value for everyday financial transactions.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations visible on their find-locations tool, including access through major retailers
24/7 online transfer initiation capability via WU.com, with in-store payment options available during agent hours
Multiple language support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Diverse service offerings including money transfers, bill payment, mobile top-ups, money orders, and card-based fund delivery
Western Union Rewards program for repeat customers with referral incentives
Online tracking capability for transfers to monitor payment status
Agent flexibility with varied hours (some locations open until 11:59 PM like Circle K locations)
cons: Requires travel to physical agent locations for cash pickup, limiting convenience for homebound or rural customers
Pricing varies significantly by transfer amount and destination; estimates required before payment
Service limitations at certain locations (e.g., Circle K #0682 offers money orders only)
Technical issues noted on website (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable, 404 errors on some pages)
Agent location hours vary widely, with some closing as early as 8:00 PM, limiting access for evening transactions
best_for: Customers sending remittances internationally or domestically who need physical cash pickup
Multilingual immigrants and international populations needing accessible language support
Users in rural areas where major retailers serve as Western Union agents
Customers preferring traditional money transfer methods over digital-only services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers who need reliable physical cash pickup locations for money transfers, especially those in rural areas or who prefer in-person transactions over digital-only platforms. The main caveat is that users must travel to agent locations during varying hours, and pricing is not transparent upfront—customers must estimate prices before committing to a transfer.
services: Online money transfer initiation via WU.com available 24/7
In-store cash pickup at agent locations
meta_description: Western Union at 7555 SW Barbur Blvd, Portland, OR. Check cashing and money transfers available.
